---
title: "Principal Component Analysis"
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Lecture Slides

{{< revealjs "slides/08_PCA.html" >}}

## Lab

## Homework

## Further reading

- S. Holmes and W. Huber. Modern Statistics for Modern Biology. [Chapter 7](https://www.huber.embl.de/msmb/07-chap.html).

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
